history.content: Draw an SVG diagram showing a simple 3-tier web architecture: browser → API server → database.

```svg
<svg width="820" height="240" viewBox="0 0 820 240" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Simple 3-tier web architecture diagram">
  <defs>
    <style>
      .box { fill:#f8fafc; stroke:#334155; stroke-width:2; rx:12; ry:12; }
      .title { font: 600 18px Arial, sans-serif; fill:#0f172a; }
      .subtitle { font: 14px Arial, sans-serif; fill:#475569; }
      .arrow { stroke:#0f172a; stroke-width:2.5; fill:none; marker-end:url(#arrowhead); }
      .label { font: 13px Arial, sans-serif; fill:#334155; }
    </style>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#0f172a" />
    </marker>
  </defs>

<rect class="box" x="40" y="60" width="220" height="120"/>
  <text class="title" x="150" y="105" text-anchor="middle">Browser</text>
  <text class="subtitle" x="150" y="130" text-anchor="middle">Client / Frontend</text>

<rect class="box" x="300" y="60" width="220" height="120"/>
  <text class="title" x="410" y="105" text-anchor="middle">API Server</text>
  <text class="subtitle" x="410" y="130" text-anchor="middle">Business Logic</text>

<rect class="box" x="560" y="60" width="220" height="120"/>
  <text class="title" x="670" y="105" text-anchor="middle">Database</text>
  <text class="subtitle" x="670" y="130" text-anchor="middle">Persistent Storage</text>

<line class="arrow" x1="260" y1="120" x2="300" y2="120"/>
  <line class="arrow" x1="520" y1="120" x2="560" y2="120"/>

<text class="label" x="280" y="108" text-anchor="middle">HTTP/JSON</text>
  <text class="label" x="540" y="108" text-anchor="middle">SQL</text>
</svg>
```
